prompt: A 1980s terminal green-screen UI for controlling a modern smart home system
prompt_refined: A retro 1980s green-screen CRT computer terminal, displaying a command-line user interface for a modern smart home system. The screen shows pixelated, monospace text and simple block graphics indicating room temperatures, lighting status (on/off), and security alerts. Visible scanlines and a slight screen curvature are present on the monitor. The bulky terminal casing is beige, with a chunky mechanical keyboard positioned directly in front.
objects: Pixelated monospace text showing room temperatures, lighting status, and security alerts
Keyboard positioned directly in front of the terminal
